name: Quantstruct
description: Quantstruct — AI-powered quantitative finance platform for analyzing financial data and building trading strategies.

seo.title: Quantstruct — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Quantstruct: Quantstruct — AI-powered quantitative finance platform for analyzing financial data and building trading strategies.

when_to_use: Building quantitative financial models with AI-assisted analysis
Analyzing market data and running backtests with ML pipelines
Generating research reports on financial datasets with AI tools
Deploying risk scoring models for investment strategies

pros: Financial-data ingestion out of the box
cons: Priced for institutional, not retail traders
review.verdict: Potentially useful for quant shops experimenting with AI, but treat as alpha until proven against QuantConnect.
review.best_for: Buy-side quant teams evaluating AI-assisted research
review.not_for: Retail traders or generic financial data apps

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
